title: rubus laevefactus
intro: Rubus laevefactus, also known as the smooth-leaved dewberry, is a perennial shrub native to North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus laevefactus include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial properties. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and has also been used in traditional herbal remedies for its supposed wound-healing and antiseptic properties.
